title: VPN authentication failed
description: User cannot connect to VPN due to authentication failure.
resolution: User reauthenticated through SSO and completed MFA approval.

title: VPN timeout connection issue
description: VPN connection times out after login.
resolution: User restarted VPN client and switched to a stable network.

title: SSO login failed
description: User receives invalid credential error during SSO login.
resolution: Password was reset through the identity portal.

title: MFA approval not received
description: User does not receive MFA push notification.

title: Account locked after failed login attempts
resolution: IT support unlocked the account and reset the password.

title: License checkout failed
description: Engineering software cannot obtain a license.

title: Shared drive access denied
description: User cannot access project shared drive.
resolution: User was added to the correct security group.

title: Remote desktop unavailable
description: Cannot connect to office workstation remotely.

title: Email synchronization issue
resolution: User reauthenticated and mailbox synchronized successfully.
